# rank-radar

A free personal crypto dashboard tracking structural rank movement, FDV / float overhang, and CoinGecko trending persistence across coins, NFTs, and narratives. Updates daily. Built by a retail crypto trader with 9 years in the space. Live at https://rank-radar-alpha.vercel.app.

The thesis: in bear or bull, rank movement is a more honest signal than price. The dashboard surfaces coins that have climbed structurally over multiple years, coins that quietly accumulated through bear conditions, coins facing imminent unlock-cliff risk, and coins commanding sustained attention versus single-day pumps.

## What's tracked

- 2+ years of weekly CoinMarketCap rank snapshots across 367 coins
- Daily live CMC top-200 snapshot
- CoinGecko trending list captured every 30 minutes (coins, NFTs, narrative categories)
- Per-coin FDV, market cap, float percentage, and historical rank trajectory
- Auto-detected bear window from total mcap drawdown
- Stale flag for coins delisted from top 200 for more than 14 days (catches hack / nuke / abandonment cases)
- AI-generated analyst notes on the homepage, movements, trending, and narratives pages, refreshed daily via Gemini Flash

## Pages

- /                  - market overview with daily AI analyst note
- /movements         - climbers (full window and bear period), persistent decliners
- /quiet             - coins that climbed in the bear but have not yet been re-rated
- /float             - float / unlock risk: death watch, survivors absorbing unlocks, overhang
- /trending          - CoinGecko trending coins with persistence rankings, new entrants, fade alerts
- /narratives        - CoinGecko trending categories (AI Agents, Prediction Markets, etc.)
- /nfts              - CoinGecko trending NFT collections with persistence rankings
- /charts            - interactive trajectories, heatmap, divergence quadrant, distribution histograms
- /notes             - auto-generated 10-coin picks with the evidence behind each
- /coin/[symbol]     - per-coin detail page (367 of them): trajectory, FDV, float, trending appearances, badges

## Data sources

- CoinMarketCap weekly historical snapshots (free, public)
- CoinGecko /search/trending endpoint (free, no API key)
- Google Gemini 2.5 Flash for analyst commentary

## Stack

Next.js 15 App Router, Tailwind, Recharts on the front. Python (pandas, pyarrow, requests) on the back. GitHub Actions for cron, Vercel for hosting. Everything lives in git. No database.

## License

Personal use, free. Not financial advice. Do your own research.
